.file-embed.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) url("data:image/svg+xmlbase64,") repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(15, 18, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(219, 84, 97) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(219, 84, 97) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(24, 29, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(219, 84, 97) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(15, 18, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(15, 18, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
